title: Boston Chinatown Neighborhood Center ransomware incident

extortion.description: For more than 50 years, BCNC has been providing new immigrants, especially Asians, with the support and resources they need to thrive in the United States.  With deep roots in Boston's Chinatown neighborhood, BCNC now serves people from three locations in Greater Boston and the South Shore                                                      We present you with personal data of employees, contracts and much more.
